title: BIC Marking 2000 ECOlutions, Multi-Surface Black Permanent Markers, Ideal for School, Bullet Tip and Quick Drying Ink, Pack of 12
features: Indelible pens that write on nearly every type of surface from paper, cardboard and plastic to glass, metal and CDs
This box contains 12 black markers with fast-drying ink that's low-odour and resists fading in light
Built to last: these pens write for ages and can be left uncapped for 1 month without drying up
These BIC Marking 2000 markers are made in Europe with 51% recycled materials (not including the ink system)
description: From the manufacturer The BIC Marking 2000 ECOlutions is a long lasting, quick drying, permanent marker that can be left uncapped for up to one month. The acrylic bullet tip pressure resistant tip can face even the toughest of working environments offering a line width of 1.7 mm. It's high-quality, alcohol-based ink, available in black, blue, red and green, is low-odour, fade-resistant and dries quickly once applied to whatever surface you are writing on.
